content.fact_text: Provides a robust, production-ready DatabaseService for PostgreSQL using Knex and Opossum, featuring transaction management, circuit breaker integration, and graceful lifecycle handling.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a singleton DatabaseService using Knex for PostgreSQL with connection pooling, Opossum for circuit breaking, Zod for schema validation, and Pino for logging. Implements transactional retries for deadlocks (40P01) and handles SIGTERM/SIGINT for graceful pool shutdown.
interfaces: runTransaction<T>(work: (trx: Knex.Transaction) => Promise<T>, retries: number): Promise<T>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a production-ready, ACID-compliant database infrastructure service with automatic retry and fault-tolerance mechanisms for inventory management.
